notes_for_human_reviewer: Classic novice. Accepts the draft as comprehensive at face value ('overall I think it looks comprehensive'). No 100%-rule audit — misses every named omission category (PMO, change management, training, documentation, transition, hypercare, closure). Does not address the activity-vs-deliverable distinction at all even though the draft is full of verb-led leaves. No decomposition reasoning. LinkedIn-speak in the suggestions ('leverage testing best practices', 'good stakeholder engagement'). Explicitly recommends AGAINST the workshop validation move — 'calling everyone into a workshop feels like overkill' — which is the exact opposite of the chapter's named approach. Light credit for cross_artifact_traceability because of the passing budget mention. Otherwise floor.
